name: Short Rest
definition: A 1-hour period of downtime for recovery
full_text: A Short Rest is a 1-hour period of downtime, during which a creature does nothing more strenuous than reading, talking, eating, or standing watch. To start a Short Rest, you must have at least 1 Hit Point.

benefits.spend_hit_point_dice: Roll Hit Point Dice, add CON modifier; regain HP equal to total (minimum 1)
